mechanism: BoJ normalization is the primary identified trigger for the next major G10 carry unwind. August 2024 was a foreshock ($150-250B liquidated). The unwind severity depends on credit cycle conditions at the time of normalization, with the BoJ's reaction function acting as a partial circuit breaker.
regime_dependence: Active during BoJ normalization cycle (expected 4-6 actions over 2026-2028). Base rate of significant dislocation is 10-15% per BoJ action, but cumulative probability across multiple actions is substantially higher.
